posts.author: Domi (Dominika)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Polish folks!

This month, we are hosting a short live session where I’ll show a practical setup in monday.com to connect the Sales pipeline and project delivery.

What I’ll cover step by step:

  • Definition of Ready/data gates before a project can start

  • automation for Won → create project

  • a simple way to track scope changes so delivery doesn’t get surprises

25/03/2026 | 11 am (timezone: CET)
Registration: https://deviniti.com/pl/deviniti-automation-studio-odc-2/

The webinar will be handled in Polish
